description: Add collapsed rendering for greedy_search tool + update deps to @earendil-works scope

asi.hypothesis: greedy_search tool output should collapse by default like read tool #4916, showing only a summary line; full output available via Ctrl+O
asi.changes: 1. Updated peerDependencies from @mariozechner/pi-coding-agent to @earendil-works/pi-coding-agent; added @earendil-works/pi-tui peerDependency. 2. Updated imports in index.ts and greedy-search-handler.ts. 3. Added renderCall showing query+engine. 4. Added renderResult with collapsed one-line summary (sources count, synthesis status, verification warning) and expanded full text output.
asi.lsp_errors: 2 expected - local node_modules lacks new @earendil-works packages; resolves when Pi loads extension

description: Fix 4 ReDoS security hotspots flagged by SonarCloud (javasecurity:S5852)

asi.hypothesis: Replace unbounded regex quantifiers with bounded ones or string checks to eliminate super-linear backtracking vulnerabilities
asi.changes:
1) bin/launch.mjs: /^
d+
d+
d+
d+$/ → /^
d{1,10}
d{1,10}
d{1,10}
d{1,10}$/ (version string match). 2) extractors/selectors.mjs: /from
s+([^.]+)
s/ → /from
s{1,20}([^.]{1,200})
s/ (citation name parse). 3) src/fetcher.mjs: Replaced 7 regex patterns with string includes checks + one bounded regex for login form. 4) src/search/sources.mjs: //+$/ → //{1,10}$/ (trailing slash removal).
